articles.title: Your squishy, wormlike ancestors are at least 4 million years older than you thought - CNN
articles.description: Newfound fossils from China suggest that complex animals were around millions of years earlier than thought, among them possibly our vertebrate ancestors.
articles.content:
Goblet-shaped sea jelly relatives with miniature arms. A plump, legless creature resembling a sausage. Long, wormlike animals tipped with flat holdfast discs for anchoring to the seafloor.
